falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below 4,150 on any single day in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A break of the August 2024 low invalidates the 79% bottom pattern match, proving this is not a repeat of that structural bottom and the macro engine's pattern recognition failed

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme fear contradicts the HOLD signal's implied stabilization; a bottom formation with blowoff score 39 should show volatility compression, not expansion, making the current verdict wrong

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield breaks above 4.75% and holds there for 2 consecutive closes
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A renewed rates shock would invalidate the bottom_2024_aug analog, as that bottom formed on rate stabilization; this would prove the macro environment differs critically from the matched pattern

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
